# eth_thesis_template

> A LaTeX thesis template for the Department of Computer Science at ETH Zurich. Provides a ready-to-use structure for bachelor's, master's, and doctoral theses with proper ETH formatting.

## Key Facts

- LaTeX thesis template for ETH Zurich Computer Science department
- Pre-configured document structure with sections, figures, and bibliography
- Uses BibTeX for reference management (compatible with Google Scholar exports)
- MIT licensed

## When to Use This Template

- You are writing a thesis at ETH Zurich Department of Computer Science
- You need a clean, pre-structured LaTeX thesis template
- You want ETH-compliant formatting without setting it up from scratch

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/KalinNonchev/eth_thesis_template

## Structure

- `latex/main.tex` — main entry point
- `latex/tex/` — thesis sections
- `latex/figures/` — figures directory
- `latex/refs.bib` — bibliography (BibTeX)
